overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay showing a character in futuristic gear traversing a dark, stormy mountain landscape. The character climbs from a rocky plateau up a steep ridge toward a beacon with glowing blue lights, while ghostly figures appear transiently in the periphery.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain plateau with scattered boulders

events.description: translucent ghostly figures briefly appear on the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: traversing the rocky plateau toward the distant beacon structure

notable_agents.action: ghostly translucent figure hovering near the rocks, visible for a moment before disappearing

entered.detail: tall thin structure emitting a vertical beam of white light into the dark clouds
large dark boulders scattered across the plateau surface
dark silhouetted mountains visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a wide, open rocky plateau under dark storm clouds. A tall beacon structure with a vertical light beam stands visible in the far distance to the right, while ghostly translucent figures briefly appear near the rocks on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep mountain slope with loose rocks

events.description: terrain shifts from flat plateau to steep uphill slope
blue glowing beacon lights become visible on the ridge ahead

agents.ego_description: climbing the steep rocky slope toward the summit beacon

entered.detail: structure with two vertical blue glowing lights on the mountain ridge
dark loose rock and dirt incline becoming steeper
large rock formation at the base of the climb

segments.scene_description: The terrain transitions to a steep uphill climb as the character ascends the mountain slope. Blue glowing lights appear on the ridge ahead, marking the destination, while the tall beacon structure looms closer on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper mountain ridge approaching the beacon

agents.ego_description: continuing the steep ascent toward the blue beacon lights on the ridge

entered.detail: steep rock wall rising on the left side of the path
silhouetted ridge line against the dark sky

segments.scene_description: The character continues climbing the steep ridge toward the objective. The blue beacon lights draw closer at the center of the frame, while the tall beacon structure on the right approaches nearer. Rocky cliffs line the left side of the narrow mountain path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a desolate mountain landscape that transforms from a wide, open plateau into a steep, narrow ascent toward a glowing beacon. It begins with the character traversing a rocky expanse under dark storm clouds, where translucent ghostly figures flicker briefly among the stones. As the terrain shifts, the camera follows the character's transition into a demanding uphill climb, with the distant vertical beam of a tall beacon structure looming larger on the right. The scene then narrows as the path becomes a steep ridge lined by rocky cliffs, drawing the character closer to the pulsing blue lights of the objective. Finally, the camera pushes forward as the beacon and its glowing markers dominate the frame, marking the end of the ascent.
